rows.label: tev065701_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Go Rogan about Larsian duty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Go Rogan about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Go Rogan about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_MSG0001
rows.name:
We Larsians draw our blades and
battle our adversaries to fulfill
our duty to Prince Jiarg.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_MSG0002
rows.name:
But what of you BLADEs? What
is your reason for risking your
life to fight the Growth?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_MSG0003
rows.name:
...It depends on the person, you say? Some
fight for the future of humanity, while
others complete missions for selfish gain?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_MSG0004
rows.name:
Then you are willing to put your life on the line
without knowing if the person next to you is of the
same mind? Without so much as a common cause?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_MSG0005
rows.name:
Perhaps that free-spirited approach
is why you are able to stand up to
the Growth, whereas we were not.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_MSG0010
rows.name:
I am Go Rogan, commander of the
Larsian Mercenaries, Third Company.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_MSG0011
rows.name:
Of course, said company is just a ragtag
bunch of novices scrounged together by
necessity after our alliance with you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_MSG0012
rows.name:
But with training—and train we
shall—my company will be every bit
as strong as the Hundred Hellions![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_MSG0013
rows.name:
May we meet again on some
future battlefield.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_MSG0018
rows.name:
Gi Zang has grown a shoulder
or two since last I saw him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_MSG0019
rows.name:
He will make a good rival. And I have you
to thank for growing as strong as I![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_MSG0020
rows.name:
Let me thank you on behalf of my departed
brothers of the Hundred Hellions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_MSG0021
rows.name:
If Gi Zang passes this skill and strength
on to the other Larsian warriors...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_MSG0022
rows.name:
then we may yet see a force
equal to the Hundred Hellions![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_MSG1001
rows.name:
Before the Growth came to our homeworld,
the Larsian army had an elite covert
force called the Hundred Hellions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_MSG1002
rows.name:
Despite their small numbers, the Hellions
were combat elites—legends that other soldiers
would speak of only in awestruck tones.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_MSG1003
rows.name:
They resisted the Growth to the very end,
and it cost nearly all of their lives.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_MSG1004
rows.name:
Gi Zang alone survived among all
the Hellions, and he came here
to Mira with the rest of us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_MSG1005
rows.name:
He has since left our ranks—to train,
he said. I wonder how he fares?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_JNK1010
rows.name: Reassure[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_SEL1011
rows.name: Tell Go Rogan about Gi Zang.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_JNK1020
rows.name: Relate[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_SEL1021
rows.name: Tell Go Rogan that the Hundred Hellions sound fascinating.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_MSG1006
rows.name: What? You know him?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_MSG1007
rows.name:
...I see. So he has grown
that strong already.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_MSG1008
rows.name:
In that case, he should end
his quest and return to us.
We need such strength now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_MSG1009
rows.name:
They were brave and proud beyond all measure!
Not a Larsian draws breath who does not look
upon the Hellions with admiration.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065701_MSG1010
rows.name:
Gi Zang wanted to count himself among the
best of them, which is why he continues his
reckless quest to this day, I imagine.[ST:wait ]
